positive: A symmetrical, stylized composition of a majestic celestial crescent moon framing intricate, bioluminescent forest flora and fauna. The style should be Neo-Art Nouveau meets modern graphic design, featuring deep sapphire blues, iridescent emerald greens, and striking cosmic purples. Emphasis on clean silhouettes, strong black linework, and flat graphic washes, maximizing contrast for apparel printing. Include swirling cosmic nebula elements and crystalline bioluminescent moss growing on giant stylized fern leaves. Central composition, highly detailed, print-ready vector quality.
